description_long: This is a medium-sized, cylindrical pillow with a slightly irregular, rounded shape. The surface is covered in a textured, striated pattern that mimics the look of soft, brushed fabric, giving it a cozy and inviting appearance. The color is a muted, cool gray with subtle variations in shading, enhancing the sense of depth and softness. The ends of the pillow are gently rounded, and the overall form appears plush and compressible, suggesting it is filled with a lightweight, airy material. There are no visible seams, tags, or decorative elements, making the design minimalistic and modern. The pillow would be suitable for use on a sofa, bed, or as a floor cushion in an urban household setting.
description: A soft, cylindrical gray pillow with a textured, striated surface and a plush, compressible appearance. Minimalistic and modern, it lacks visible seams or decorative elements.
description_view_0: Oblique side view showing the elongated, cylindrical shape and the textured, striated surface pattern.
description_view_1: End-on view revealing the rounded, circular end and the subtle surface texture radiating outward.
description_view_2: Opposite oblique side view, similar to view 0, highlighting the pillow's length and soft, brushed texture.
description_view_3: Direct view of the other end, showing the rounded shape and the concentric striations of the surface.
